summary: Compact icon avatar for visually identifying a person, group, channel, or conversation type.
useWhen: A list or message composition needs a consistent 32px circular identity marker represented by an icon.
avoidWhen: The identity has a supplied photograph, initials, presence state, or editable profile behavior; those variants are not part of this primitive.
accessibility: Provide label only when the icon communicates meaning that surrounding text does not already convey.
Omit label when the owning row or message already provides an equivalent accessible name.
responsiveBehavior: The avatar keeps its fixed 32px circle and 20px icon at every viewport size.
